title: callaion palustris
intro: Callaion palustris, also known as Marsh Marigold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The medicinal properties of Callaion palustris include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support the immune system and provide relief from symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. The herbal preparations of Callaion palustris include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
